name: Tostadas De Pollo y Frijoles
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked, mashed black beans (or refried beans)
1 cup String beans, cooked and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay a tortilla on each plate.
2. Spread with a layer of beans.
3. Place chicken on the beans.
4. Toss together vegetables and cheese.
5. Mound the mixture on top of the chicken.
6. Sprinkle hot sauce on top.
